name: stakewise-llm-tools
description: StakeWise tools for AI assistants — MCP server (npm) and standalone data-query skill.

plugins.name: stakewise-data-query
plugins.description: Ask questions in any language about StakeWise V3 (APY, your stake, exit-queue ETA, osETH health factor, boost LTV, distributor claims, vestings, transaction history). Read-only. Queries public StakeWise subgraphs and backend GraphQL on Mainnet, Gnosis, Hoodi; uses public RPC nodes for on-chain conversions. Always responds in the user's language. No SDK install, no local server.
